title: Iranian woman arrested in US for allegedly trafficking arms to Sudan
content: Shamim Mafi is accused of brokering the sales of arms to Sudan's defence ministry on behalf of Iran.

originalTitle: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them
title: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them
content: Many Nigerians associate bats with witchcraft but that did not deter ecologist Iroro Tanshi.

title: Powerful states are trying to sabotage decarbonisation of shipping
content: Pacific Island states cannot and will not allow key climate shipping agreement to be watered down.

title: Tight security in Islamabad as US-Iran talks set to go ahead
content: Security is on lockdown in Islamabad where preparations are being made for new US‑Iran talks.

title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
content: Three boys and five girls, aged between three to 11, were killed in the shooting on Sunday, officials say.

title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
content: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

title: Should Gabriel have been sent off for Haaland clash?
content: Gabriel pushed his head towards Erling Haaland's face yet escaped with only a booking. Why did the VAR not intervene for a red card?

originalTitle: Konate says he is close to signing new Liverpool deal
title: Konate says he is close to signing new Liverpool deal

originalTitle: Redesigned ball could reduce heading impact - scientists
title: Redesigned ball could reduce heading impact - scientists
content: Scientists believe footballs could be designed to reduce the impact of heading after new research discovered the action caused a previously unreported pressure wave energy transfer to the brain.
